theme: Gap Year — Good Idea or Not

sentences.english: Do you think taking a gap year before university is a good idea?
sentences.korean: 대학 전 갭이어를 가지는 것이 좋다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: Give reasons to support your opinion.
I think taking a gap year can be very beneficial if used wisely.
sentences.korean: 현명하게 활용한다면 갭이어가 매우 유익할 수 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Many high school students choose their major without truly knowing what they want to do.
sentences.korean: 많은 고등학생이 정말 하고 싶은 게 뭔지 모르면서 전공을 선택해요.

sentences.english: A gap year gives them time to explore their interests through travel work or volunteer experiences.
sentences.korean: 갭이어는 여행 일 봉사 경험을 통해 관심사를 탐색할 시간을 줘요.

sentences.english: However a gap year without a plan can lead to wasted time.
sentences.korean: 하지만 계획 없는 갭이어는 시간 낭비로 이어질 수 있어요.

sentences.english: So the key is to set clear goals before starting — whether that's learning a language gaining work experience or doing community service.
sentences.korean: 핵심은 시작 전에 명확한 목표를 세우는 거예요 — 언어 학습이든 업무 경험이든 봉사활동이든.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
Gap Year — Good Idea or Not
